final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a tropical resort infinity pool overlooking the ocean, evoking an immediate desire to vacation.

Style/medium: photorealistic luxury travel editorial photography, vivid color grading reminiscent of Condé Nast Traveler spreads
Composition: wide-angle shot from pool deck level, horizon line aligned with the infinity edge merging into the sea, symmetrical yet relaxed framing
Subject: infinity pool with crystal-clear turquoise water, lounge chairs with white cushions, colorful beach umbrellas, tall coconut palm trees framing the scene
Scene/backdrop: open ocean stretching to the horizon, bright blue sky with fluffy white clouds, lush tropical greenery flanking the pool
Lighting/mood: midday tropical sun, warm golden light, high clarity, uplifting and inviting holiday atmosphere
Color palette: saturated turquoise and cobalt blue dominate water and sky; warm sandy white for deck and loungers; vivid green from palms as contrast accent
Materials/textures: smooth wet pool tiles with light caustics, polished stone pool deck, fabric texture on umbrella canopies, natural palm frond detail
Avoid: overcast sky, desaturated tones, empty lifeless scene, people looking unnatural, lens flare artifacts, watermark
